thought_beat_text: The seams won't stay hidden—he sees the foam-core edge, the fingerprint pressed into clay, the stage light catching what was meant to stay invisible. But naming it would shatter the whole structure, and he needs this performance to be real, even though his own eyes have already betrayed him.
residue_summary: He carries forward the knowledge that he cannot unsee, paired with the desperate choice to keep performing as if he hasn't—the admission now embedded in every gesture.
image_hint: close-up of a hand trembling near a seam, stage light exposing what should remain shadow
audio_hint: held breath beneath a ticking clock, the sound of cardboard creasing under pressure
